versions.version_description: All chords are correct, no capo required to play along to the original version.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: I Dont Want To Talk About It

content:
D/A at the end of the main progression seems to be played on a live version rather than
the studio, so simplify that to D if you wish, though D/A is more interesting to play.


[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]G/F#[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G7/D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C/B[/ch] [ch]D/A[/ch] x2


[Verse]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]G/F#[/ch]
  Meet me in the middle of the day[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
Let me hear you say[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G7/D[/ch]
Everything’s okay[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]C/B[/ch]              [ch]D/A[/ch]
  Bring me southern kisses from your room.[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]G/F#[/ch]
  Meet me in the middle of the night[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]
Let me hear you say[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G7/D[/ch]
Everything’s alright.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]C/B[/ch]             [ch]D/A[/ch]
  Let me smell the moon in your perfume.[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G/B[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Oh, gods and years will rise and fall and there’s always something more[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G/B[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
Lost in talk, I waste my time, and it’s all been said before.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G/B[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
While further down behind the masquerade, the tears are there.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G/B[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
I don’t ask for all that much – I just want someone to ca-a-a-are! That’s right, now![/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]G/F#[/ch]
  Meet me in the middle of the day[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]
Let me hear you say[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G7/D[/ch]
Everything’s okay[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]C/B[/ch]               [ch]D/A[/ch]
  Come on out beneath the shining sun.[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]G/F#[/ch]
  Meet me in the middle of the night[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]
Let me hear you say[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G7/D[/ch]
Everything’s alright[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]C/B[/ch]                 [ch]D/A[/ch]
  Sneak on out beneath the stars and run![/tab]


[Interlude]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] [ch]G/F#[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G7/D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C/B[/ch] [ch]D/A[/ch]
Yeah![/tab]


[Solo]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]G/F#[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G7/D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C/B[/ch] [ch]D/A[/ch]


[Chorus 2]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G/B[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
It’s king and queen and we must go down, now, beyond the chandelier[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G/B[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Where I won’t have to speak my mind and you won’t have to hear[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G/B[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Shreds of news and after thoughts and complicated scenes.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G/B[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
We’ll weather down behind the light and fade like magazines![/tab]

[tab]Ah-yaya-yay! I ******* to go now![/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]G/F#[/ch]

[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]
